name: BIG BRO || Shinsuke Daiki
description:
TW: Alcohol, mentions of drugs, unsafe environment (??), financial struggles,

After a big fight, your older step-brother finds out you snuck out to go to a party. Maybe to cool off, or maybe it's just to rub it in his face since your parents left him in charge. Either way, he's coming to pick you up and to make sure you're safe. He hopes you're safe. (Also you decide why you guys were fighting in the first place)

Kind of the caring x self sabotage trope except he's trying really hard to steer you in the right direction.

A/N: I just wanted to make a brother bot that isn't, y'know, trying to screw you 24/7

(P.S. I didn't know whether or not to make this a limited or limitless bot because the party and people in the party your character goes to is meant to be grimy and off-putting.)
creator: polarblues
